input.background: Each of the following batches of numbers has a mean of 100. The task is to determine which batch has the most variability without performing arithmetic calculations.
input.question: Which batch (A, B, or C) has the most variability?

output.answer: Batch A has the greatest variability.

batch_A_values.value: Values of batch A (not explicitly provided in the problem, assumed to be part of the data if available)
batch_A_values.description: The numerical values in batch A.

batch_B_values.value: Values of batch B (not explicitly provided in the problem, assumed to be part of the data if available)
batch_B_values.description: The numerical values in batch B.

batch_C_values.value: Values of batch C (not explicitly provided in the problem, assumed to be part of the data if available)
batch_C_values.description: The numerical values in batch C.

mean_value.description: The mean value of each batch, which is given as 100.
